title: Fig. 1 d e MO nstrati O n
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: Fig. 1 d e MO nstrati O n
objective: To solve a linear equation, say 2 x   + 3 = 5
materials:
Blue and red chart papers/rubber sheets, scissors,
ruler, pencil, eraser, cardboard, white paper,
adhesive.
procedure:
1.   Take a cardboard and paste a white paper on it.
2.   Cut some blue and red rectangular pieces (size   x   ×   1) and some blue
and red square pieces (size 1   ×   1) from the chart paper/rubber sheet
as shown in Fig.1.
Fig. 1
3.   Consider each blue rectangular piece as ( +x ) and red rectangular piece
as   (– x ). Similarly consider the blue and red square pieces as (+1) and
(–1)   respectively.
discussion:
This activity is useful in explaining the meaning of factors of a polynomial.
284 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
